'''kawapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seabord|seabord]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-w-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seabord|seabord]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| kawapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæwæpæth|kæwæpæth]] || [[word:kæwæpæj|kæwæpæj]] || [[word:kæwæpæsh|kæwæpæsh]] || [[word:kæwæpæ|kæwæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kawawapath|kawawapath]] || [[word:kawawapaj|kawawapaj]] || [[word:kawawapash|kawawapash]] || [[word:kawawapa|kawawapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kawapath|kawapath]] || [[word:kawapaj|kawapaj]] || [[word:kawapash|kawapash]] || [[word:kawapa|kawapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kawafpath|kawafpath]] || [[word:kawafpaj|kawafpaj]] || [[word:kawafpash|kawafpash]] || [[word:kawafpaf|kawafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kawapatha|kawapatha]] || [[word:kawapaja|kawapaja]] || [[word:kawapasha|kawapasha]] || [[word:kawapaka|kawapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kawapath|kawapath]] || [[word:kawapaj|kawapaj]] || [[word:kawapash|kawapash]] || [[word:kawapa|kawapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kawapathal|kawapathal]] || [[word:kawapajal|kawapajal]] || [[word:kawapashal|kawapashal]] || [[word:kawapakal|kawapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kawapathatha|kawapathatha]] || [[word:kawapajaja|kawapajaja]] || [[word:kawapashasha|kawapashasha]] || [[word:kawapaka|kawapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kawapathan|kawapathan]] || [[word:kawapajan|kawapajan]] || [[word:kawapashan|kawapashan]] || [[word:kawapakan|kawapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kawapathaoro|kawapathaoro]] || [[word:kawapajaoro|kawapajaoro]] || [[word:kawapashaoro|kawapashaoro]] || [[word:kawapakaoro|kawapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
